title: Vegapunk Reveals the Sinking World
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Vegapunk as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The flower capital, wano

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard to believe this foreign transmission is reaching us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now... you may be wondering how he came to be known as a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We found the snail in the Castle Among Orochi's possessions.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you were a pirate, Joy Boy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Just like UFFY.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You know of him, my LORD?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A jail cell at the G-4 naval base...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Joy boy?! Who cares?! I bet you could easily beat him, right, Captain kid?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Duh! The man's already dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's our cap'n! The only thing bigger than his confidence is his belly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah, I'm clearly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...a million times tougher than this joy toy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's joy boy, boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: do bear in mind...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only have access to a handful of DoneGlyphs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But their combined narrative clearly chroniccles...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...an unbelievable history about a great war in the distant past!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: During that period, Joy Boy faced an enemy... the organization now known as the world government!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait... isn't that us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, he did say he was a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: VEGAPUNK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A temporary coalition consisting of 20 separate kingdoms!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back then, they were merely the Allied powers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can be assumed that an alliance was the only feasible way to oppose the formidable faction to which joy boy belonged!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am afraid that the cause of this conflict still eludes me, so I do not presume to judge the morality of the complaints. I can however say that this war was a clash of two opposing ideologies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mentioned earlier that joy boy was born into a fantastical civilization...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Zou, New World

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
